summary: Frontend-only regression after image/category/Bulgarian fixes. All 9 in-scope items verified working. NO mock-module / 'Cannot find module' runtime errors. Hero shows new luxury beauty image. Product cards render with onError fallback (verified zero images with '|' in src). Categories section shows 5 cards (HAIRCARE 348, MEN'S CARE 12, Other 150, PERFUMES 6775, SKINCARE 62 = 7347 total) each with luxury background image. Products page subtitle correctly reads 'Discover our curated collection of 7347 luxury products'. Product detail loads with image + name. Language toggle flips EN/BG (verified: 'THE LUXURY COSMETICS DESTINATION' -> 'ДЕСТИНАЦИЯ ЗА ЛУКСОЗНА КОЗМЕТИКА', category counts use Bulgarian plural 'продукта'). Guest cart works (cart badge increments via localStorage on Quick Add). Only console noise: harmless 401s on anonymous /api/auth/me & /api/cart polls (pre-existing, noted in iteration_6).

integration_issues.issue: Console still emits 401 errors on every page load (likely from /api/auth/me and/or /api/cart called even when no token). Non-blocking, but noisy and was already flagged in iteration_6. Recommend guarding these calls behind a token check.

action_items: Optional/low-priority: suppress the 401s on /api/auth/me & /api/cart for anonymous users (carryover from iteration_6).

Optional: real product images from the CSV often fail to load and fall back to the Unsplash placeholder, so every product card on the listing looks identical (same luxury cosmetics stock photo). Functionally correct (fallback works), but visually all 7347 products share one image. If real per-product imagery is desired, audit the source URLs in the CSV / consider proxying or self-hosting.
critical_code_review_comments: imageUtils.getProductImages correctly splits on '|', trims, filters non-http entries, and falls back. Good defensive coding.
ProductCard uses local imgError state with FALLBACK_IMAGE swap on onError — clean pattern.
Home.jsx categories use CATEGORY_IMAGES[category.id] keyed by category id (perfumes/skincare/haircare/menscare/other) — matches the IDs the backend returns. Verified visually.
Bulgarian plural is correctly handled via t('productSingular') vs t('productsCount') with count===1 check.

Hero.css uses inline url() for the background-image — works, but consider keeping HERO_IMAGE constant from imageUtils.js as the single source of truth (currently the URL is duplicated in imageUtils.js HERO_IMAGE and Hero.css). Minor DRY concern.

test_credentials.admin: konstantin.kirchev.bs@gmail.com / aS1zX2QwE34xK9 (not exercised this iteration — frontend-only public flows)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All previously-reported image/category/hero/mock-import issues are fixed and visually verified on the deployed preview URL. Total product count math is consistent across UI: 348+12+150+6775+62 = 7347. Add-to-cart works for guests via localStorage (verified via Quick Add on listing — cart badge increments to 1). The legacy 401 console noise from anonymous /api/auth/me & /api/cart polls is the only remaining cosmetic issue and is non-blocking.
